ideation: This sequence imitates a seal playfully "swimming" or "waving" with its flippers.  The animation will focus on a rhythmic, up-and-down motion of both arms, mimicking the movement of a seal's flippers in the water.  The arms will move somewhat independently, adding to the playful, less-coordinated feel of a seal's movements.  I'll use the two joints to create a fluid, slightly uneven motion. Wrist movement will be minimal to emphasize the larger arm movements.

frames.beat: arms lift slightly, like playful flippers
flippers dip and rise in a gentle, uneven wave
flippers bob up and down, a seal's happy greeting
arms settle, a final gentle sway
